title: MRunner Plugin Registry
description: Index of community plugins installable from the MRunner settings UI

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date of the last registry update

name.description: Human-readable display name of the plugin

description.description: Short description of what the plugin does

author.description: Name or email of the plugin author

url.description: Git URL to install the plugin from (https or ssh)

verified.description: Whether the plugin has been reviewed by the MRunner maintainers
